title: Fix resolved paper trade cards — PnL, Current price, team name
objective: Resolved paper trade cards show '—' for both PnL and Current price, and display 'mlb-se' (mangled slug) instead of team names. Three root-cause bugs, all in buildUnifiedPositionCards() and renderUnifiedPositions() in dashboard.html. Fix all three.

context.symptom: Resolved paper trade cards show: Current = '—', PnL display = '—', team = 'mlb-se'. Command bar shows correct P&L (+$30.79) but the cards show nothing.
context.root_cause_1: buildUnifiedPositionCards() reads r.unrealized_pnl_dollars for the PnL display (line ~710) and r.current_price for the Current stat box (line ~738). These are shadow rec fields. Paper trades from the DB have pnl_usd and exit_px respectively — but those names don't match. So both show '—'.
context.root_cause_2: For closed paper trades where no shadow rec is available (yesterday's games are date-filtered), r.tracked_team and r.home_team are both null. The fallback at line ~720 calls shortTeam(r.market_slug) which runs 'mlb-sea-laa-2026-04-04'.split(' ').pop().slice(0,6) = 'mlb-se'. TEAM_ABBR only maps full city+team names, not slug abbreviations.
context.root_cause_3: gameCtxPill (line ~714) requires r.away_team && r.home_team — both null for the same reason as root_cause_2. Pill is blank. This is auto-fixed by fixing root_cause_2.

deliverables.label: Fix 1 — PnL fallback to pnl_usd
deliverables.where: buildUnifiedPositionCards() — near line 704 where unrlzdUsd is declared

deliverables.label: Fix 2 — Current price fallback to exit_px
deliverables.where: buildUnifiedPositionCards() — near line 738 where Current stat box renders fmtPx(r.current_price)
deliverables.change:
Before the pos-stats HTML block, add: const currentPx = r.current_price ?? (r.resolved ? r.exit_px : null); Then change the Current stat box value from:
${fmtPx(r.current_price)}
To:
${fmtPx(currentPx)}

deliverables.label: Fix 3 — Slug parser for team names
deliverables.where: Add helper function near shortTeam (line ~471), and update buildUnifiedPositionCards() game/teamDisplay logic

acceptance_criteria: Resolved paper trade cards show a dollar amount for PnL (e.g. '+$53.00') not '—'
Resolved paper trade cards show a price in the Current stat box (e.g. '100.0¢' for a resolved YES, or the exit_px in cents) not '—'
Resolved paper trade cards show team names like 'SEA @ LAA' not 'mlb-se'
Open paper trades (if any) still work correctly — no regression
Shadow-only position cards still work correctly — no regression
No changes to any server-side files
verification: Open dashboard in browser. With the 2 resolved paper trades (mlb-sea-laa-2026-04-04) visible:
1. PnL display must show a dollar value, not '—'
2. Current stat box must show a price in cents (the exit price from DB), not '—'
3. Team display must show something like 'SEA @ LAA', not 'mlb-se'
rollback: Revert dashboard.html only. Server is unaffected.
